Home / Services / Garage Door Panel Replacement

Garage Door Panel Replacement

Restore your garage door's appearance and functionality with our panel replacement service.

Damaged garage door panels can detract from your home's curb appeal and compromise the security of your garage. Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona offers professional garage door panel replacement services. We can replace individual panels that are dented, cracked, or otherwise damaged.

We offer a wide variety of panel styles and colors to match your existing garage door. Our technicians will carefully remove the damaged panel and install a new one, ensuring a seamless fit. We'll also inspect your entire garage door system to identify any potential problems.

Don't let a damaged garage door panel ruin your home's appearance. Call us today for a free estimate.

Our Process

  1. 01 Assess the damage to the garage door panels.
  2. 02 Match the existing panel style and color.
  3. 03 Remove the damaged panel and install a new replacement.
  4. 04 Ensure proper alignment and secure attachment.
  5. 05 Test the door's operation.

Benefits

  • Improved curb appeal of your home.
  • Restored security of your garage.
  • Extended lifespan of your garage door.
  • Prevention of further damage to your door.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I replace just one panel on my garage door?

Yes, in most cases, you can replace just one panel on your garage door if it is damaged.

How do I match the color of my existing garage door panels?

We can help you match the color of your existing garage door panels using paint samples or manufacturer specifications.

How long does it take to replace a garage door panel?

Replacing a garage door panel typically takes 1-2 hours.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with garage door panel replacement? Contact us today.
